SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.annotation

注釈インタフェース Positive

@Documented @Retention(CLASS) @Target({TYPE_USE,FIELD,METHOD,PARAMETER,CONSTRUCTOR,TYPE_PARAMETER,LOCAL_VARIABLE}) public @interface Positive
Marks a numeric type usage intended to be strictly positive. Primitive integrals must be greater than zero (>= 1). Floating-point primitives (and boxed wrappers where applicable) must be strictly greater than zero (> 0.0); NaN is not considered positive here. For documentation and static analysis. On public API methods in this library that validate arguments, out-of-range values cause IllegalArgumentException (see each method).
関連項目:
  • NonNegative
  • NonNull
  • Nullable
